About.title: Less motivational talks. More building and connecting.
About.body: Born in November 2025 with the purpose of fueling the entrepreneurship and technology ecosystem in Guatemala. A community created from the need for high-value spaces.

visibility.description: We spotlight the startups being built from Guatemala.

education.description: We educate the ecosystem through events, resources, and real connections.

CodeOfConduct.title: Code of conduct
CodeOfConduct.intro_body: Be the person who adds, not the one who takes away. At the502project we build a space where everyone feels safe, respected, and motivated to create. Treat others how you'd want to be treated: with respect, empathy, and professionalism.
CodeOfConduct.section1_body: At the502project we believe diversity makes us stronger. Regardless of your gender, race, sexual orientation, abilities, physical appearance, or beliefs. This is your space to learn, create, and grow.
CodeOfConduct.section2_title: We treat each other with respect
CodeOfConduct.section2_body: Whether at in-person events, on WhatsApp, or any other community channel, we aim for an environment of constructive collaboration. Differences of opinion are welcome, but we always express them with professionalism.
CodeOfConduct.section3_body: We do not accept any form of discrimination, harassment, intimidation, or behavior that makes anyone feel unsafe or unwelcome.
CodeOfConduct.forbidden_lang_2: Explicit sexual language or inappropriate content
CodeOfConduct.forbidden_lang_3: Violent content, threats, or intimidating language
CodeOfConduct.forbidden_harass_1: Harassment of any kind, in person or online
CodeOfConduct.forbidden_harass_2: Unwanted sexual attention or inappropriate advances
CodeOfConduct.report_title: Were you a victim or witness?
CodeOfConduct.report_body: Your safety and wellbeing are our priority. If you experience or witness any behavior that violates this code of conduct, contact the502project representatives immediately. Your report will be treated with confidentiality.

Partners.meta_description: Let's build the region's tech ecosystem together. 502 brings together the builders shaping the future of software in Central America, backed by Cursor and Notion. Join as a partner.
Partners.email_subject: Application to the partners program · The 502 Project
Partners.email_body: Hi 502 team. I'd like to apply as a partner.%0D%0A%0D%0ABrand / company:%0D%0ARole:%0D%0AWhat we want to achieve:%0D%0ALevel of interest (Supporter / Partner / Lead Partner):

hero.title: The region's tech ecosystem won't build itself. We're building it.
hero.subline: 502 brings together the builders defining the future of software in Central America. Join as a partner and let's grow the ecosystem together.
hero.scarcity: Exclusive program. We review every application carefully.

mission.title: Central America already builds world-class software. It lacks the ecosystem to power it.
mission.kicker: Partners join a movement. They don't buy space.

gather.title: We gather the talent
gather.body: Founders, engineers and creators in one place.

produce.title: We produce the spaces
produce.body: Events and gatherings the community already shows up for.

connect.title: We connect the ecosystem
connect.body: People, companies and opportunities that grow together.

proof.title: We're already building it. Here are the numbers.

backers.title: Who already believes in this.
backers.note: The same tools the best builders in the world use stand behind what we're building in the region.

cursor.name: Cursor
cursor.tag: The AI code editor for builders

tiers.title: Three ways to build with us.
tiers.intro: Choose how you want to join. Each tier is a different way to partner with the community.

supporter.name: Supporter
supporter.audience: For early-stage brands starting to build presence.

benefits.b1: Constant digital presence across the community's channels.
benefits.b4: Preferred access to premium space tickets.

partner.name: Partner
partner.audience: For startups with traction and mid-sized companies ready for action.

benefits.b1: Physical presence with a booth or activation at monthly events.
benefits.b2: Speaking time to deliver technical value to the audience.
benefits.b3: Access to the community's talent channel.

lead.name: Lead Partner
lead.audience: For leading brands and corporates seeking maximum presence.

benefits.b1: Maximum visibility across every digital and physical asset.
benefits.b3: Full access to the community's talent.

close.cta_title: Let's build the region's ecosystem, together.
close.cta_body: If you share the vision, let's talk. Tell us who you are and what you want to build.
close.note: Exclusive program. We choose carefully who we build with.

PrivateEvents.meta_description: Paid workshops with limited seats and profile requirements. Direct support for builders.
PrivateEvents.title: Workshops
PrivateEvents.subline: Limited seats, set investment, hands-on support.
PrivateEvents.context_lead: At The 502 Project we run open events for 100+ people to teach practical use of artificial intelligence—hackathons, talks, and meetups where many learn at once.
PrivateEvents.context_body: At those mass events we can't work with you one-on-one. These workshops have set investment, limited seats, and profile requirements: you build with support and leave with a deliverable.
PrivateEvents.corporate_title: Workshop at your company, or one built for you?
PrivateEvents.corporate_body: We bring this format to your team or design a private workshop around your goals in AI, product, and building.
PrivateEvents.corporate_bullet_1: Same facilitation standard and hands-on work, at your office or ours.
PrivateEvents.corporate_bullet_2: Content and roadmap tailored to your team. Not a generic workshop.
PrivateEvents.requirements_beginner_note: A workshop for beginners. No prior experience needed.
PrivateEvents.cta_note: Once we verify your payment we'll send you the details by email.
